ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the granting agency */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant period */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated to the grant */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., basic research, applied research, development) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the grant review process (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review process */,
  "num_investigators" INTEGER /* Number of investigators involved in the grant */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Summary of the expected outcomes of the project */,
  "project_deliverables" TEXT /* List of deliverables expected from the project */,
  "impact_statement" TEXT /* A statement on the potential impact of the research */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* The date when funding starts */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* The date when funding ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the granting agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  "funding_limit" REAL /* Maximum funding limit for grants from this agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the agency's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the investigator belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the investigator is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* A brief description of the investigator's research interests */,
  "publications" TEXT /* A list of relevant publications */,
  "cv_url" TEXT /* URL to the investigator's CV */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the investigator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant application */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant applied for */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator who submitted the application */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., new, renewal) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the project */,
  "budget_details" TEXT /* Detailed budget breakdown */,
  "review_score" REAL /* The score given by the review committee */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewers */,
  "submission_pdf_url" TEXT /* URL to the PDF of the submitted application */,
  "submission_status_date" TEXT /* The date the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress report */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "progress_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the progress made since the last report */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Planned next steps for the project */,
  "financial_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the financial status of the grant */,
  "milestones_achieved" TEXT /* List of milestones achieved since the last report */,
  "challenges_faced" TEXT /* Challenges faced during the project period */,
  "support_needed" TEXT /* Additional support needed for the project */,
  "report_pdf_url" TEXT /* URL to the PDF of the submitted report */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who reviewed the report */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the reviewer belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the reviewer is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the reviewer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigator_grants" (
  "investigator_grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the investigator in the grant (e.g., PI, co-PI, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigator_grants_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigator_grants_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_deliverables" (
  "deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deliverable */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant */,
  "deliverable_description" TEXT /* Description of the deliverable */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the deliverable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deliverable (e.g., pending, completed, delayed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the deliverable was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_deliverables_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the outcome */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date the outcome was achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_outcomes_grant_id FOREIGN KEY ("grant_id") REFERENCES grants ("grant_id")
)
